stemHtml: When radar vectoring is terminated and ATC wants the pilot to navigate to waypoint LESDA, what phraseology will the controller use?

options.b: Resume own navigation. Fly direct to "LESDA", magnetic track 150, distance to "LESDA" 41 nautical miles.
options.c: Radar service terminated. Fly direct to "LESDA".
options.d: Resume previous navigation, position 15 NM South of VOR XY.
